patterns.name: DP_ID
patterns.comment: DP ID starting with IN followed by digits

patterns.name: PAN
patterns.comment: PAN card number — 5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter

patterns.name: DP_ACCOUNT_CDSL
patterns.comment: 16-digit CDSL DP account (digits may have spaces)

patterns.name: CIF
patterns.comment: CIF number — supports: CIF 12345678, CIF: 12345678, CIF no. 12345678

patterns.name: CORP_ID
patterns.comment: Corporate ID — supports: CORP ID ABC123, CORP: XYZ001, CORPID AB9988. Adjust if your format differs.

patterns.name: USER_ID
patterns.comment: User ID — supports: USER ID U12345, UID: 456789, userid uid112233. Adjust if your format differs.
